# Alter

> The credential layer for apps and agents calling third-party APIs. Every call gets a credential. Every credential gets a policy. Every action gets a log.

## Documentation


### Get Started

  - [Alter](https://docs.alterauth.com/index)
  - [Quickstart](https://docs.alterauth.com/quickstart)
  - [How Alter works](https://docs.alterauth.com/how-it-works)

### Guides

  - [Call APIs on Behalf of Users](https://docs.alterauth.com/guides/call-apis-on-behalf-of-users)
  - [Provision Secrets for Backend Services](https://docs.alterauth.com/guides/provision-secrets-for-backend-services)
  - [Give an AI Agent Scoped Access](https://docs.alterauth.com/guides/give-an-agent-scoped-access)
  - [Add Human-in-the-Loop Approvals](https://docs.alterauth.com/guides/add-human-in-the-loop-approvals)
  - [Embed the Connect Widget](https://docs.alterauth.com/guides/embed-the-connect-widget)
  - [Integrate with Claude Code (MCP)](https://docs.alterauth.com/guides/integrate-with-claude-code-mcp)

### Concepts

  - [Apps & Organizations](https://docs.alterauth.com/concepts/apps)
  - [Providers](https://docs.alterauth.com/concepts/providers)
  - [Credentials](https://docs.alterauth.com/concepts/credentials)
  - [Agents](https://docs.alterauth.com/concepts/agents)
  - [Identity](https://docs.alterauth.com/concepts/identity)
  - [Policies](https://docs.alterauth.com/concepts/policies)
  - [Scopes](https://docs.alterauth.com/concepts/scopes)
  - [Audit Logs](https://docs.alterauth.com/concepts/audit-logs)

### Admin

  - [Setting Up an App](https://docs.alterauth.com/admin/setting-up-your-app)
  - [Connecting an Identity Provider](https://docs.alterauth.com/admin/identity-provider)
  - [API Keys](https://docs.alterauth.com/admin/api-keys)
  - [The Wallet Dashboard](https://docs.alterauth.com/admin/wallet)
  - [Exporting Audit Logs](https://docs.alterauth.com/admin/audit-export)

### Reference

  - **Python SDK**
    - [Python SDK](https://docs.alterauth.com/reference/python-sdk/index)
    - [Client](https://docs.alterauth.com/reference/python-sdk/client)
    - [Calling APIs](https://docs.alterauth.com/reference/python-sdk/calling-apis)
    - [Connect & Grants](https://docs.alterauth.com/reference/python-sdk/connect-and-grants)
    - [Agents & Keys](https://docs.alterauth.com/reference/python-sdk/agents)
    - [Types](https://docs.alterauth.com/reference/python-sdk/types)
    - [Errors](https://docs.alterauth.com/reference/python-sdk/errors)
    - **Frameworks**
      - [FastAPI](https://docs.alterauth.com/reference/python-sdk/frameworks/fastapi)
      - [LangChain](https://docs.alterauth.com/reference/python-sdk/frameworks/langchain)
      - [MCP](https://docs.alterauth.com/reference/python-sdk/frameworks/mcp)
  - **TypeScript SDK**
    - [TypeScript SDK](https://docs.alterauth.com/reference/typescript-sdk/index)
    - [Client](https://docs.alterauth.com/reference/typescript-sdk/client)
    - [Calling APIs](https://docs.alterauth.com/reference/typescript-sdk/calling-apis)
    - [Connect & Grants](https://docs.alterauth.com/reference/typescript-sdk/connect-and-grants)
    - [Agents & Keys](https://docs.alterauth.com/reference/typescript-sdk/agents)
    - [Types](https://docs.alterauth.com/reference/typescript-sdk/types)
    - [Errors](https://docs.alterauth.com/reference/typescript-sdk/errors)
    - **Frameworks**
      - [Express](https://docs.alterauth.com/reference/typescript-sdk/frameworks/express)
      - [Next.js](https://docs.alterauth.com/reference/typescript-sdk/frameworks/nextjs)
  - **Connect SDK**
    - [Connect SDK](https://docs.alterauth.com/reference/connect-sdk/index)
    - [AlterConnect.create()](https://docs.alterauth.com/reference/connect-sdk/create)
    - [alterConnect.open()](https://docs.alterauth.com/reference/connect-sdk/open)
    - [Events & callbacks](https://docs.alterauth.com/reference/connect-sdk/events)
    - [Types](https://docs.alterauth.com/reference/connect-sdk/types)
  - **CLI**
    - [Alter CLI](https://docs.alterauth.com/reference/cli/index)
    - [Authentication](https://docs.alterauth.com/reference/cli/authentication)
    - [Output & scripting](https://docs.alterauth.com/reference/cli/scripting)
    - **Commands**
      - [alter apps](https://docs.alterauth.com/reference/cli/commands/apps)
      - [alter keys](https://docs.alterauth.com/reference/cli/commands/keys)
      - [alter agents](https://docs.alterauth.com/reference/cli/commands/agents)
      - [alter providers](https://docs.alterauth.com/reference/cli/commands/providers)
      - [alter managed-secrets](https://docs.alterauth.com/reference/cli/commands/managed-secrets)
      - [alter policy](https://docs.alterauth.com/reference/cli/commands/policy)
      - [alter audit](https://docs.alterauth.com/reference/cli/commands/audit)
      - [alter sdk-passthrough](https://docs.alterauth.com/reference/cli/commands/sdk-passthrough)
